scorza23: posts big blind 50
*** HOLE CARDS ***

devas3000: folds 
jcjax001: raises 50 to 100
scorza23: folds 
VuckoX: calls 50
*** FLOP *** [Js Ac Kc]
jcjax001: bets 100
VuckoX: raises 741 to 841 and is all-in
jcjax001: calls 741
*** TURN *** [Js Ac Kc] [Jh]
*** RIVER *** [Js Ac Kc Jh] [9h]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
jcjax001: shows [9d Jd] (a full house, Jacks full of Nines)
VuckoX: shows [Qs 5s] (a pair of Jacks)
jcjax001 collected 1932 from pot

VuckoX finished the tournament in 4th place

Table '3975837847 1' 4-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: devas3000 (1457 in chips, $1.76 bounty) 
Seat 2: jcjax001 (2318 in chips, $3.08 bounty) 
Seat 3: scorza23 (225 in chips, $1.76 bounty) 
jcjax001: posts small blind 25
scorza23: posts big blind 50
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to scorza23 [Kd 6d]
devas3000: raises 100 to 150
jcjax001: calls 125
scorza23: raises 75 to 225 and is all-in
devas3000: calls 75
jcjax001: calls 75
*** FLOP *** [8s Ah 9d]
jcjax001: checks 
devas3000: bets 338
jcjax001: folds

*** TURN *** [8s Ah 9d] [8c]
*** RIVER *** [8s Ah 9d 8c] [9h]
*** SHOW DOWN ***
scorza23: shows [Kd 6d] (two pair, Nines and Eights)
devas3000: shows [7d Ad] (two pair, Aces and Nines)
devas3000 collected 675 from pot
devas3000 wins $0.44 for eliminating scorza23 and their own bounty increases by $0.88 to $2.64
scorza23 finished the tournament in 3rd place
